title: Bridge Essay: Engineering Pareidolia: Mental Imagery, Perceptual Scaffolding, and Visual Creativity.
concept: Imagination as real perception — shared neural circuitry for imagery and perception, hallucination as continuum.

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Imaginal Reconstruction** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Imagination as real perception — shared neural circuitry for imagery and perception, hallucination as continuum.

**Engineering Pareidolia: Mental Imagery, Perceptual Scaffolding, and Visual Creativity.** - Brain sciences (2026). DOI: 10.3390/brainsci16030321. PMID: 41892664. Pareidolia is often framed as a viewer-side illusion: a tendency to perceive meaningful forms-especially faces-in ambiguous inputs. This Concept Paper argues that pareidolia can also be deliberately  Pareidolia is often framed as a viewer-side illusion: a tendency to perceive meaningful forms-especially faces-in ambiguous inputs.
